channel.title: Blog on NTU IoT Sensing Group
channel.description: Recent content in Blog on NTU IoT Sensing Group
channel.copyright: ©{year}, NTU IoT Sensing Group. All Rights Reserved

item.title: Linshan completed his PhD defense
item.description: Linshan completed his PhD defense, Dec 6th 2021..

item.title: Group graduate Zhenyu won the Rising Star Award of ACM SIGBED China
item.description: Dr. Zhenyu Yan won the Rising Star Award of ACM SIGBED China, 2021. (Click for details)

item.title: Dr. Zhenyu Yan and Dr. Chaojie joined the faculty of CUHK and ZJU
item.description: Dr. Zhenyu Yan and Dr. Chaojie joined the faculty of CUHK and ZJU.

item.title: Qun, Siyuan, and Joy presented their papers at e-Energy'21 and SECON'21
item.description: Qun, Siyuan, and Joy presented their papers at e-Energy’21 and SECON’21.

item.title: Wenjie presented PhyAug at IPSN'21 and won Best Artifact Award Runner-Up
item.description: Wenjie has presented our paper “PhyAug: Physics-Directed Data Augmentation for Deep Sensing Model Transfer in Cyber-Physical Systems” on the ACM/IEEE IPSN 2021, part of CPS Week 2021. The paper has also be selected as the Best Artifact Award Runner-up. Congratulations!

item.title: IEEE PES Day 2021 Talk
item.description: Rui gave a talk titled “Experiences and Learned Lessons from an Air Free-Cooled Tropical Data Center Testbed (Dec 2017 – Dec 2019)” on IEEE PES Day 2021.

item.title: Zhenyu attended the Convocation 2020
item.description: Zhenyu attended the NTU Convocation for the Class of 2020 and had his Ph.D. degree officially conferred. Rui also witnessed the ceremony.

item.title: Chaojie completed his PhD defense
item.description: Chaojie completed his PhD defense, Sep 22nd 2020.

item.title: Zhenyu completed his PhD defense
item.description: Zhenyu completed his PhD defense, Feb 20th 2020.

item.title: IPSN TPC meeting 2020
item.description: IPSN TPC meeting, Washington University in St. Louis, Jan 2020.

item.title: Embedded AI Submit 2019 at Shenzhen
item.description: Embedded AI Submit, Shenzhen, Dec 2019

item.title: Central Park, New York
item.description: Central Park, New York, Nov 2019

item.title: Qun's paper presentation at SenSys'19
item.description: Qun’s paper presentation “Moving Target Defense for Embedded Deep Visual Sensing against Adversarial Examples” at SenSys, New York, Nov 2019.

item.title: Paper presentation at AIChallengeIoT'19
item.description: Paper presentation “Challenges of Privacy-Preserving Machine Learning in IoT”, the First International Workshop on Challenges in Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning for Internet of Things (AIChallengeIoT’19), New York, Nov 2019.

item.title: Twilights of Los Cabos
item.description: Twilights of Los Cabos Sunrise in Cabos. Art walk at Cabo San Lucas Downtown.

item.title: Zhenyu and Rui at Los Cabos
item.description: Zhenyu and Rui at Los Cabos, Oct 2019

item.title: MobiCom 25th Anniversary
item.description: MobiCom 25th Anniversary, on a beach of Los Cabos, Oct 2019 MobiCom 2019 limited edition!

item.title: Zhenyu's Paper Presentation at MobiCom'19
item.description: Zhenyu’s paper presentation at ACM MobiCom, Oct 2019

item.title: Qun's Presentation at UBICOMP'19
item.description: Qun’s paper presentation at UbiComp, Singapore, Oct, 2018

item.title: Linshan's Paper Presentation, IoTDI'19
item.description: Linshan’s paper presentation “On Lightweight Privacy-Preserving Collaborative Learning for Internet-of-Things Objects” at IoTDI, Montreal, Apr 2019

item.title: Twilight of Montreal
item.description: Twilight of Montreal, CPS-IoT Week, Apr 2019

item.title: Keynote of LPNET, EWSN'19
item.description: Keynote “Cyber-Physical Approach to Resilient City-Scale IoT Systems”, The 1st workshop on Low Power Wide Area Networks for Internet of Things, EWSN’19, Tsinghua University, Feb 2019

item.title: 2nd Fog Computing+ Workshop at NTU
item.description: The 2nd Fog Computing+ Workshop: Trustworthy Fog, Dec 14th 2018, NTU Singapore

item.title: The DATA: Data Acquisition to Analysis Workshop at SenSys'18
item.description: The DATA: Data Acquisition to Analysis Workshop, SenSys’18, Shenzhen, Nov, 2018.
